stories.description: Agent Platform: Cento MCP server and Codex/Claude skills

review: Acceptance: A developer can install or start the Cento MCP server locally from the repo.
Acceptance: Codex has documented skill guidance that prefers Cento MCP tools for board and cluster operations.
Acceptance: Claude Code has equivalent project instructions.
Acceptance: The MCP exposes common agent-work, story manifest, cluster, bridge, and platform operations.
Acceptance: Dangerous actions are intentionally scoped and documented.
Acceptance: One validation demo records story, validation, builder, validator, and hub evidence.
Human handoff: Point MCP-capable clients at the repo-root .mcp.json.
Human handoff: Copy .env.mcp.example to .env.mcp on each node and set CENTO_ROOT.
Note: The Linux node was used for cross-node context and post-sync validation, but its unrelated dirty industrial-panel work was not modified.
Review note must include: Delivered, Validation, Evidence, Residual risk
Residual risk must be stated explicitly, even when the risk is none.
